cookieNotice.body: This app uses cookies for sign-in. No tracking cookies are used.

dashboard.emptyDescription: When you save your jobs here you get a clear overview, statistics and next steps all in one place. This gives you a significantly simpler workflow in your job search and when it's time to file your activity report with Arbetsförmedlingen.
dashboard.quickImportLabel: Paste job listing URL from Arbetsförmedlingen
dashboard.todoEmpty: Nothing to follow up on right now.
dashboard.todoSavedText: You saved {jobReference}. Take the next step and decide whether to apply by {date}.
dashboard.todoSavedDeadlinePassedText: The application deadline for {jobReference} was {date}. Apply now if the listing is still open or close the job.
dashboard.todoSavedDeadlineSoonText: You saved {jobReference}. Send your application by {date} if the job is still relevant.
dashboard.todoAppliedOverdueText: It has been 14 days since you sent the application for {jobReference}. Send a follow-up and ask for a status update.
dashboard.todoAppliedUpcomingText: If you have not received a response about {jobReference}, plan a follow-up by {date}.
dashboard.todoInProcessOverdueText: The process for {jobReference} is still ongoing. Reach out and ask about the next step.
dashboard.todoInProcessUpcomingText: If you have not heard anything about {jobReference}, follow up on the process by {date}.
dashboard.todoInterviewOverdueText: It has been a week since the interview for {jobReference}. Reach out and ask for a status update.
dashboard.todoInterviewUpcomingText: If you have not heard anything after the interview for {jobReference}, follow up by {date}.
dashboard.todoOfferOverdueText: You marked {jobReference} as an offer. Confirm your answer or schedule the next step with the employer.
dashboard.todoOfferUpcomingText: Set a clear next step for the offer regarding {jobReference} and respond by {date}.
dashboard.todoSavedOverdue: Send application to {company} for {title} as soon as possible. It should have been sent by {date}.
dashboard.todoApplied: Follow up on application at {company} for {title}. It has been 14 days since you sent the application.
dashboard.todoInterview: Contact {company} about {title}. It has been 7 days since the interview with no response.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. The job and all associated information will be permanently deleted.

landing.languagePromptDescription: Which language would you like to view the homepage in? You can always change it later in the footer.
landing.heroTitle: Organize your job search like a pro.
landing.heroDescription: Jobi.sh helps you keep track of applications, interviews, and offers in one place.
landing.heroHighlightsHeading: Examples of the overview in Jobi.sh
landing.dailyTipsTitle: Get new job-search tips every day
landing.dailyTipsDescription: Enable push notifications for small, practical tips that help you improve your job search, keep your routine going, and get new ideas for the next step. You decide when tip notifications should be on and use them when they actually help.
landing.featurePipelineDescription: Collect jobs in one view that shows what needs to happen next. Clear and easy to follow up without having to manage separate notes or spreadsheets.
landing.featureStatisticsDescription: Get a quick view of your applications, interviews, and offers without spreadsheets or manual summaries.
landing.featureExtensionDescription: Import job listings directly from Platsbanken. File your activity report with one click when you log in to Arbetsförmedlingen.
landing.howItWorksDescription: Three simple steps to bring order to your job search without building your own system around it.
landing.step1Description: Keep searching where you already look for roles that fit you.
landing.step2Description: Save job listings in Jobi.sh with one click using our browser extension.
landing.step3Description: See the status, next follow-up, and what actually moves you closer to an interview.
landing.testimonialsRegionDescription: When you focus the controls, automatic rotation pauses. Use the buttons to show the previous, next, or a specific testimonial.
landing.testimonial1Quote: I immediately got a better sense of which applications needed follow-up.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I save the listing right away and see the whole process in one place.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Filing my activity report is much faster and easier to remember.
landing.testimonial4Quote: I can see more quickly which applications are actually moving forward.
landing.testimonial5Quote: Everything is collected in one place, which makes job searching feel calmer.
landing.benefit1: All job data in one place instead of scattered notes.
landing.benefit2: A quick overview of how many processes are actually moving forward.
landing.benefit3: Less friction between searching, follow-up, and activity reporting.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to land your next job?
landing.ctaDescription: Open Jobi.sh and bring your job search into a flow built to be used every day.
landing.footerTagline: A little less painful. A lot more Jobi.sh.

status.title: Status
status.hint: Select where in the process this job is.
status.changeError: The job could not be updated right now.

jobDetail.title: Job Details
jobDetail.subtitle: Track status, history and next steps
jobDetail.notFound: The job could not be found.
jobDetail.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. The job and all associated information will be permanently deleted.

newJob.title: Add Job
newJob.loadingText: The form will appear automatically once the listing data is ready.
newJob.checkingExisting: Checking if the listing is already saved...
newJob.fetchDataError: Could not fetch data automatically right now.
newJob.checkError: Could not check if the listing is already saved.
newJob.saveError: Could not save the job right now.
newJob.notesPlaceholder: Role focus, interview signals, referral path and next steps.

editJob.title: Edit Job
editJob.subtitle: Update the information for the saved job.
editJob.notFound: The job could not be loaded for editing.
editJob.saveError: Could not update the job right now.

account.title: Account
account.deleteNote: When deleting your account, all personal data will be permanently deleted.

theme.title: Theme
theme.lightDesc: Light interface with clean surfaces and maximum readability.
theme.darkDesc: Darker surfaces that are easier on the eyes in low light conditions.

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.description: Choose whether we should send notifications for new to-dos, daily tips, or both to your enabled devices.
pushNotifications.supportUnsupported: Push notifications require a modern browser with service worker support and HTTPS or localhost.
pushNotifications.supportBlocked: The browser is currently blocking notifications. Allow notifications in your browser settings if you want to enable the feature again.
pushNotifications.supportActive: This device is registered for push notifications from Jobi.sh. You choose whether we send To Do, Tips, or both.
pushNotifications.supportInactive: Enable push notifications on this device to catch new to-dos right away and get a job-search tip on days when the list is empty.
pushNotifications.loadError: Could not load notification settings from the server.
pushNotifications.subscriptionCount: Active push devices on the account: {count}.
pushNotifications.subscriptionCountWithOneOther: Active push devices on the account: {count}, including 1 on another device.
pushNotifications.subscriptionCountWithManyOthers: Active push devices on the account: {count}, including {otherCount} on other devices.
pushNotifications.todoDescription: Send push notifications when a new to-do becomes active for one of your jobs.
pushNotifications.tipsDescription: Send job-search tips on days when you do not have any active to-dos to follow up on.
pushNotifications.saveSettingsError: Could not save the notification settings.
pushNotifications.invalidSubscriptionError: The browser returned an incomplete push subscription.
pushNotifications.toastUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
pushNotifications.toastMissingConfig: Push notifications are not configured yet. Add the VAPID key to the environment variables.
pushNotifications.toastPermissionDenied: Allow notifications in the browser to enable push notifications.
pushNotifications.toastEnabled: Push notifications enabled. You will receive to-do notifications first and otherwise a daily job-search tip.
pushNotifications.toastAlreadyDisabled: Push notifications were already turned off on this device.
pushNotifications.toastDisabled: Push notifications turned off on this device.

createProfile.title: Create Profile
createProfile.subtitle: Fill in your details to get started.
createProfile.updatedTermsSubtitle: We have updated our terms of service. You need to accept them to continue using Jobi.sh.
createProfile.termsReviewNote: Your details are pre-filled below. Review them and accept the updated terms to continue.

report.title: Activity Report
report.empty: There are no registered application dates to report yet.
report.selectMonth: Select a month to see which jobs you applied for during that period.
report.reportSuccess: The job was sent to the extension and the AF page will open.
report.reportError: The extension did not respond. Open the extension page and install the correct version for your browser.
report.reportDeliveryError: The extension is installed but did not respond to the report action. Reload the page and try again.
report.drawerDescription: To send jobs directly to Arbetsförmedlingen from this page you need to have the Jobi.sh Extension installed in {browser}.

auth.verifyDescription: We have sent a verification code to:

errors.form_code_incorrect: Incorrect code. Check and try again.
errors.verification_expired: The code has expired. Request a new code.
errors.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.form_identifier_not_found: No user found with that email address.
errors.strategy_for_user_invalid: The login method is not supported for this account.

extension.title: Connect Jobi.sh with Arbetsförmedlingen
extension.subtitle: Here you'll find the Chrome and Firefox extensions so you can send jobs to Arbetsförmedlingen and import listings from Platsbanken directly.
extension.feature1Title: File activity reports at AF directly from Jobi.sh
extension.feature1Body: Send jobs from Jobi.sh and fill in Arbetsförmedlingen's activity report without copying each field manually.
extension.feature2Body: On job listings in Platsbanken you get your own Jobi.sh button that automatically imports the listing into Jobi.sh.
extension.installBody: Jobi.sh Extension is available for both Chrome and Firefox. Choose your browser below to install the extension and get started.
extension.bulletReport: Report jobs to Arbetsförmedlingen from the activity report.
extension.bulletImport: Import listings from Platsbanken to Jobi.sh.
extension.comingSoon: The store link will be added here once the {browser} version is published.
extension.chromeDesc: The Chrome version will be published in the Chrome Web Store. Once the listing is live you will find the store link here.
extension.safariStatus: Publishing to App Store for Safari
extension.safariDesc: The Safari version will be published in the App Store. Once the listing is live you will find the store link here.
extension.firefoxDesc: The Firefox version will be published in Firefox Add-ons. Once the listing is live you will find the store link here.
